title: Alternate Seele Emblem from Episode 23
wikitext:
[]: Alternate Seele Emblem from Episode 23             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Mon Feb 25, 2013 5:33 pm While looking through episode 23 for a quote, I happened upon this image: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Felipe » Mon Feb 25, 2013 5:50 pm Kinda reminds me of the spectrum analysis of different chemical elements, except each interruption along the black lines should have a different color. Oh wait...

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Mon Feb 25, 2013 5:51 pm DNA tests come out sort of looking like that.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Mon Feb 25, 2013 6:41 pm I'm with Chuckman on this one. Where exactly is this wall?

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Mon Feb 25, 2013 6:45 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: I'm with Chuckman on this one. Where exactly is this wall?

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Mon Feb 25, 2013 6:51 pm If that's the case, I wouldn't be surprised about the DNA theory. Actually, the line spectra emission theory works as well; since the writings on the walls are the names of subatomic particles, it's feasible.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Feb 25, 2013 9:32 pm There's a short mention of it here: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/695/Seele-no-Monshou/ But nothing new that hasn't already been mentioned here. I thought there was an older ANF discussion about it but maybe it never got archived.

Article: Alternate Seele Emblem from Episode 23
[]: Alternate Seele Emblem from Episode 23             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Mon Feb 25, 2013 5:33 pm While looking through episode 23 for a quote, I happened upon this image: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Felipe » Mon Feb 25, 2013 5:50 pm Kinda reminds me of the spectrum analysis of different chemical elements, except each interruption along the black lines should have a different color. Oh wait...

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Mon Feb 25, 2013 5:51 pm DNA tests come out sort of looking like that.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Mon Feb 25, 2013 6:41 pm I'm with Chuckman on this one. Where exactly is this wall?

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Mon Feb 25, 2013 6:45 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: I'm with Chuckman on this one. Where exactly is this wall?

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Mon Feb 25, 2013 6:51 pm If that's the case, I wouldn't be surprised about the DNA theory. Actually, the line spectra emission theory works as well; since the writings on the walls are the names of subatomic particles, it's feasible.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Feb 25, 2013 9:32 pm There's a short mention of it here: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/695/Seele-no-Monshou/ But nothing new that hasn't already been mentioned here. I thought there was an older ANF discussion about it but maybe it never got archived.
